states.name: Off
states.description: The device is in the off state. The OnOff attribute is FALSE, and no timed operations are active (OnTime and OffWaitTime are 0).

states.name: On
states.description: The device is in the on state. The OnOff attribute is TRUE, and no timed operations are active (OnTime and OffWaitTime are 0).

states.name: TimedOn
states.description: The device is in the on state with a scheduled automatic transition to off. The OnOff attribute is TRUE, and OnTime is actively counting down (OnTime > 0 and not 0xFFFF).

states.name: DelayedOff
states.description: The device is in the off state with a guarded period preventing immediate re-activation. The OnOff attribute is FALSE, and OffWaitTime is actively counting down (OffWaitTime > 0 and not 0xFFFF).

attributes_used: OnOff (bool, SN, R V, default FALSE, M, scene_capable)
GlobalSceneControl (bool, R V, default TRUE, LT, scene_capable)
StartUpOnOff (StartUpOnOffEnum, RW VM, default MS, LT)
scene_behaviors: OffWithEffect: If GlobalSceneControl is TRUE, store current settings in global scene and set GlobalSceneControl to FALSE.
OnWithRecallGlobalScene: If GlobalSceneControl is FALSE, call Scenes Management cluster server.recall_global_scene() and update OnOff based on recalled scene, then set GlobalSceneControl to TRUE.
